pillars.title: Holder-Controlled Identity
pillars.summary: Citizens own their identity anchors. The registry publishes verifiable records, not secrets, so no central gatekeeper can unilaterally revoke access.

pillars.title: Tiered Verification
pillars.summary: Progressive trust levels reflect documented contribution, governance participation, and operational responsibility — not gatekeeping or exclusion.

pillars.title: Transpublic Record-Keeping
pillars.summary: Identity events, rotations, and tier changes are logged on-protocol and auditable by design.

pillars.title: Regional Node Integrity
pillars.summary: 18 regional nodes maintain synchronized registry shards with consensus validation, minimizing single-domain failure.
